title: TlsCertificate
description: A custom TLS certificate used to terminate TLS traffic for one or more fully qualified domain names.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the TLS certificate.

name.description: A customizable name for the certificate.

issued_to.description: The common name of the entity the certificate was issued to.

issuer.description: The certificate authority that issued the certificate.

serial_number.description: The serial number of the certificate.

signature_algorithm.description: The algorithm used to sign the certificate.

not_before.description: The date the certificate is valid from.

created_at.description: The date and time the certificate was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the certificate was last updated.
